articles.title: Dwayne Johnson gets emotional at CinemaCon 2026, reveals his grandfather inspired Maui in Moana: 'He'd be very proud right now'
articles.description: Dwayne Johnson revealed that his Moana character Maui was inspired by his late grandfather, calling him a powerful and charismatic influence in his life. The actor grew emotional while paying tribute, saying he feels proud to channel his grandfather’s spirit on screen.

articles.title: Paresh Rawal calls Sunil Grover and ‘The Kapil Sharma Show’ ‘everyday competition’ for comedy films, calls comedians ‘bloody volcano’
articles.description: Paresh Rawal, in Bhooth Bangla, says comedy films face stiff competition from The Kapil Sharma Show and Sunil Grover's "volcano" talent. Writing quality humor is tough without big writer teams, unlike TV. He recalls chaotic early Bollywood days and eyes the film's April 17 release with Akshay Kumar.

articles.title: Eva Longoria proves the LBD never goes out of vogue
articles.description: Eva Longoria captivated at the 2026 AFI Lifetime Achievement Awards in a stunning, minimalist black gown. The actress showcased the enduring power of the little black dress with a daring neckline and sheer, flowing skirt. Her elegant ensemble, paired with subtle accessories and a statement glove, proved that classic style speaks volumes, a lesson learned from her Desperate Housewives character.

articles.title: Who is Aliya Korotkaya? 22-year-old beauty queen dating 71-year old Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko
articles.description: Aliya Korotkaya, a 22-year-old beauty queen, has drawn attention after being linked to Alexander Lukashenko, aged 71. Reports indicate that she has appeared with the Belarusian leader at multiple public events, including official gatherings and sports matches. The reported connection has sparked debate due to the significant age difference and Lukashenko’s political profile, keeping the story widely discussed.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce grow increasingly protective of their privacy ahead of the big day amid rising security concerns
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have faced a few security threats in the last few months and it seems, they are only growing more concerned about it, ahead of their wedding in July. The high profile couple were recently spotted at the upscale New York City private club, Casa Cipriani, where it seems extra precautions were taken to protect Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s privacy.

articles.title: 'You deserve a National Award': Bharathiraja praises Raadhika’s Performance in ‘Thaai Kizhavi’, actress responds with heartfelt promise
articles.description: Veteran filmmaker Bharathiraja praised actress Raadhika Sarathkumar's performance in her film 'Thaai Kizhavi'. Raadhika visited Bharathiraja as he recovers from a health scare. She expressed her gratitude, promising to seek his blessings if she receives a National Award. This interaction highlights their enduring bond and the respect Bharathiraja commands in the film industry. Several personalities visited him during his recovery.

articles.title: Anand Mahindra’s Monday motivation is a nonagenarian who proves you can change your life’s script any day
articles.description: Anand Mahindra Monday Motivation: Anand Mahindra has highlighted the inspiring journey of Prabhavati Bhagwati, a 98-year-old entrepreneur from Ahmedabad, who started her home-based venture “Nani’s Nashta” after personal loss. Her story of resilience and late-life entrepreneurship, built on traditional Gujarati food and word-of-mouth success, is now motivating people across generations to believe that it’s never too late to start anew.

articles.title: How Much Does Akshay Kumar's Son Aarav Earn Per Month?

articles.title: Archana Puran Singh reveals how Kapil Sharma Show stalled her four-decade-long acting career, says 'nobody is offering roles'
articles.description: Archana Puran Singh Acting Career Stalled: Archana Puran Singh revealed her long stint on The Kapil Sharma Show brought fame but limited film roles due to tight schedules. The shift to Netflix's season-based format now offers her flexibility for new projects. Despite a four-decade career, she feels filmmakers still perceive her solely as a laughing personality, hoping recent work will change this.

articles.title: Are you stressed and overloaded? R Madhavan shares a simple one-minute trick to calm your mind and find focus
articles.description: Actor R. Madhavan recently captured the internet's attention by highlighting a fascinating "brain massage" technique that uses bilateral stimulation to ease mental fatigue. This scientific approach uses rhythmic audio to help balance brain activity and quieten a busy mind. As he transitions to his next gritty role in Legacy, Madhavan continues to share intriguing wellness finds with his followers.

articles.title: Love quote of the day by Keanu Reeves: 'Falling in love and having a relationship are two different things'
articles.description: Falling in love is an intense, often unexpected emotion, while a relationship is a deliberate, ongoing effort built on actions like communication, compromise, and respect. The article highlights that while love is a beautiful feeling, it's the sustained work and commitment that truly define and sustain a relationship, not just the initial spark.

articles.description: Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge is experiencing a slowdown in its fifth week, with new release Bhooth Bangla impacting collections. Despite a dip, the film added Rs 12.55 crore over the weekend, pushing its net India total to Rs 1,115.67 crore. Globally, it has grossed an estimated Rs 1,756.64 crore, nearing Baahubali 2's record.

articles.title: You won’t spot it at first, until the camera zooms in on the snake hiding in plain sight
articles.description: A viral video reveals a snake perfectly camouflaged in a home's corner, highlighting how easily these creatures blend into their surroundings. Snakes often enter homes seeking food or shelter, then remain hidden in quiet spots. This serves as a stark reminder to pay closer attention to overlooked areas within our own living spaces.

articles.title: Quote of the day by American comedian Richard Pryor: ‘I urge you to ask yourself just how honorable it is to preside over the abuse...’
articles.description: Richard Pryor, a legendary comedian, used his platform to address uncomfortable truths. His powerful words challenged society's casual acceptance of animal suffering. Pryor's message called for a moral examination of our actions and complicity. He believed that true honor lies in compassion for all creatures. His legacy extends beyond laughter to a call for empathy and justice.
